CT. 9.40. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: PROCEEDING NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GREATAUPAIR, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 24, 2021 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 302 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-24-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GREATAUPAIR, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT GREATAUPAIR, LLC'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT HAS TEN (10) DAYS TO ANSWER. (CAL. RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.1320(J)(1).) ORDER SIGNED. (SEE SIGNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GREATAUPAIR, LLC'S MOTION TO STAY IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. POTENTIAL RULEMAKING BY THE FEDERAL STATE DEPARTMENT IS NOT FAR ADVANCED. Amended Notice Of Defendant Greataupair, Llcs Motion To Stay & Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-17-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Greataupair, LLC's motion to stay is denied without prejudice. Potential rulemaking by the federal state department is not far advanced. As Judge Schulman's well-reasoned order earlier this year found, the issue is not yet ripe.

order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-24-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GREATAUPAIR, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant GreatAuPair, LLC's Demurrer to the First Amended Complaint is overruled. Defendant has ten (10) days to answer. (Cal. Rules of Court, rule 3.1320(j)(1).) (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
